creator: freebsd@bilogic.org
text:
Wine no longer builds because the Makefile is outdated, and the old distribution tarballs are gone.

Fix: 

1) change PORTVERSION to 2001.10.04
2) update distinfo to "MD5 (Wine-20011004.tar.gz) = 3a23a634b7eff17a1631571f7be25421"
3) delete files/patch-gf (it's part of the main distribution now).
